title: Uneasy Summer
original_title: Wenn es Nacht wird auf der Reeperbahn
overview: A crime reporter uncovers a lurid plot by a Hamburg gang to dose impressionable young girls with LSD in order to enslave them into prostitution. Featuring mad killers, psychedelic acid trips and ladies mud wrestling!
